Professional-Grade Aluminum Banner Frame System with Weather-Resistant 13 oz Vinyl for Custom Outdoor Display Applications PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW **Frame Configuration:** Single Banner Frame | Double Banner Frame **Banner Material:** 13 oz Vinyl for Outdoor Frames | Premium Weather-Resistant Vinyl **Hardware Package:** Complete Frame Kit with Stakes | Frame Only | Replacement Banners Only **Custom Size Options:** Standard 33" x 94" | Custom Dimensions Available PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Outdoor Banner Frame System for Large Format Custom Display Applications

The Large Outdoor Banner Frame combines professional-grade aluminum construction with high-quality vinyl banner printing to create the perfect portable display solution for outdoor events, construction sites, and business locations. This complete system includes a lightweight aluminum frame that assembles quickly without tools, weather-resistant bungee cord attachments, ground stakes for secure installation, and a convenient nylon carrying case for transport and storage.

Each banner frame kit includes one or two full-color custom printed 33" x 94" vinyl banners manufactured from durable 13 oz outdoor vinyl material. The aluminum frame construction provides excellent wind resistance while remaining lightweight enough for single-person setup and breakdown. Professional bungee cord attachment points ensure your custom banners stay securely mounted even in challenging weather conditions.

Perfect for trade shows, outdoor events, construction site signage, real estate displays, and business promotions, this banner frame system offers the durability and professional appearance your brand demands. The complete kit includes everything needed for immediate deployment, making it ideal for businesses that need reliable outdoor advertising solutions.

All banner frames include custom full-color printing on weather-resistant vinyl material designed specifically for outdoor banner frame applications. The 13 oz vinyl material provides excellent print quality while maintaining the flexibility needed for proper frame mounting and long-term outdoor exposure.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Durable 13 oz Vinyl Banner Material for Outdoor Banner Frame Applications

Our outdoor banner frames utilize premium 13 oz vinyl banner material specifically selected for outdoor frame applications. This professional-grade vinyl provides excellent durability for both indoor and outdoor installations while maintaining the flexibility required for proper banner frame mounting.

The 13 oz vinyl material offers superior print quality with vibrant colors that resist fading from UV exposure. This material weight provides the perfect balance between durability and flexibility, ensuring your banners mount properly on the aluminum frame while withstanding wind, rain, and temperature variations.

Material Specifications:

  • 13 oz outdoor-rated vinyl construction
  • UV-resistant inks for long-lasting color vibrancy
  • Weather-resistant material suitable for extended outdoor exposure
  • Flexible material designed specifically for frame mounting applications
  • Professional-grade material used by commercial sign manufacturers

Size Variance Information: Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate conditions. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. If your banner frame application requires precise dimensions, please discuss your specific requirements with our customer service team.

Request a material sample packet to evaluate our vinyl material quality for your outdoor banner frame project.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Finishing & Installation Hardware for Professional Display Setup

Every outdoor banner frame system includes professional-grade finishing and installation hardware designed for reliable outdoor performance. The complete hardware package ensures quick setup and secure installation for any outdoor display application.

Complete Hardware Package Includes:

  • Lightweight aluminum frame components with snap-together assembly
  • Weather-resistant bungee cords for secure banner attachment
  • Ground stakes for stable outdoor installation
  • Durable nylon carrying case for transport and storage
  • Setup instructions for quick assembly

Frame Construction Features:

  • Corrosion-resistant aluminum tubing for long-term outdoor use
  • Tool-free assembly system for quick setup and breakdown
  • Reinforced connection points for enhanced stability
  • Lightweight design for easy transport and handling
  • Professional appearance suitable for business applications

The banner attachment system uses high-quality bungee cords that provide consistent tension while allowing for natural banner movement in wind conditions. This prevents stress on both the banner material and frame components, ensuring long-term reliability for your outdoor display investment.

Ground stakes are included for secure installation on grass, dirt, or other soft surfaces. For concrete or asphalt installations, weighted base options are available through our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production scheduling to meet your outdoor banner frame delivery requirements. Choose from multiple production timeframes ranging from express 2-day production to economy 5-day scheduling, allowing you to balance timeline requirements with budget considerations.

2 Business Days Express Production:

Ideal for urgent outdoor display requirements and last-minute event needs. Express production ensures your custom banner frame system is completed and ready for shipment within 2 business days of artwork approval.

3 Business Days Standard Production:

Our most popular production timeframe offers fast turnaround at no additional cost. Standard production provides excellent scheduling flexibility for most outdoor banner frame applications while maintaining our quality standards.

5 Business Days Economy Production:

Cost-effective production option perfect for advance planning and budget-conscious projects. Economy production offers reduced pricing while delivering the same professional quality outdoor banner frame systems.

Production Timeline Details:

  • Production time starts from completed file upload and artwork approval
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day
  • Proof requests extend timeline until approval is received
  • Emergency same-day production may be available - contact customer service for availability
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and selected shipping method

All production times represent business days (Monday through Friday, excluding holidays). Weekend and holiday scheduling does not count toward production timeframes.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Payment & Ordering Options

We accept multiple payment methods for outdoor banner frame orders, providing convenient options for both individual and business customers. All orders must be paid in full before production begins to ensure timely processing of your custom banner frame system.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Visa credit and debit cards
  • MasterCard credit and debit cards
  • American Express cards
  • Discover cards
  • Business and personal checks (must clear before production)

Payment Processing Information:

  • Credit cards are not charged until order approval is complete
  • Check payments must be received and cleared before production begins
  • Business accounts may qualify for net payment terms
  • All pricing includes both banner frame hardware and custom printed banners

For check payments, please allow additional processing time for check clearance before your outdoor banner frame enters production. Learn more about check payment processing for detailed information about check order procedures.

Business customers requiring purchase orders, net payment terms, or special billing arrangements should contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss account setup and payment options.

International orders may have additional payment requirements and restrictions. Please contact customer service for international payment processing information.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Large Format Banner Frame Delivery

Outdoor banner frame systems ship via UPS Ground unless expedited shipping is selected at checkout. Each banner frame package includes tracking information provided automatically once your order ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress.

Standard Shipping Information:

  • UPS Ground shipping included for most destinations
  • Tracking numbers provided via email when orders ship
  • Shipping costs calculated by package weight and destination
  • Additional charges apply for oversized banner frame orders
  • Delivery times vary by destination and selected shipping method

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Economy Shipping (5-10 business days) - Cost-effective for advance planning
  • Standard UPS Ground (3-5 business days) - Most popular shipping option
  • UPS 3-Day Select (3 business days) - Faster delivery for time-sensitive needs
  • UPS 2-Day Air (2 business days) - Expedited delivery option
  • UPS Next Day Air (1 business day) - Overnight delivery when available

Important Shipping Notes:

  • Shipping delays due to weather or carrier issues do not qualify for shipping refunds
  • Damaged packages must be reported immediately with photos for replacement processing
  • Lost packages are replaced after carrier confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days)
  • All carrier terms and conditions apply once packages are shipped

International Shipping: International banner frame shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact customer service for detailed international shipping procedures.

For shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order. Visit our complete shipping information page for additional shipping details and policies.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Display Applications for Outdoor Banner Frames

Large outdoor banner frames provide versatile signage solutions for numerous business, event, and promotional applications. The portable design and professional appearance make these banner frame systems ideal for both temporary and semi-permanent outdoor display needs.

Business & Commercial Applications:

  • Construction site identification and safety messaging
  • Real estate property marketing and open house promotion
  • Retail location advertising and promotional campaigns
  • Restaurant and hospitality business outdoor advertising
  • Service company job site identification and contact information

Event & Trade Show Applications:

  • Outdoor trade show booth displays and brand identification
  • Festival and fair vendor booth signage
  • Sporting event sponsor recognition and advertising
  • Community event information and wayfinding
  • Corporate event branding and directional signage

Institutional & Non-Profit Uses:

  • School and university event promotion
  • Government agency public information displays
  • Non-profit organization fundraising and awareness campaigns
  • Religious organization event announcement and outreach
  • Political campaign advertising and voter information

Advantages for Outdoor Display:

  • Weather-resistant construction suitable for extended outdoor exposure
  • Portable design allows relocation as needed
  • Professional appearance maintains brand image
  • Quick setup and breakdown for temporary applications
  • Cost-effective alternative to permanent signage solutions

The 33" x 94" banner size provides excellent visibility while remaining manageable for transport and setup. This size works particularly well for roadside visibility, event identification, and business location advertising where impact and readability are essential.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Outdoor Banner Frame Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your outdoor banner frame graphics. Our production team can work with various file formats, but following these guidelines will help achieve the best possible results for your custom banner frame project.

Recommended File Formats:

  • Vector EPS files with fonts converted to outlines (preferred for best quality)
  • High-resolution PDF files (300 DPI minimum recommended)
  • High-resolution TIFF files for photographic content
  • High-resolution JPG files (300 DPI minimum, maximum compression quality)

File Size and Resolution Guidelines:

  • Maximum file upload size: 60 MB through our online system
  • Minimum resolution: 300 DPI for optimal print quality
  • Large format files should maintain at least 150 DPI at full size
  • Vector artwork provides the best quality at any size

Design Considerations for Banner Frames:

  • Allow adequate margin space around important text and graphics
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • Use high-contrast color combinations for outdoor visibility
  • Account for banner frame mounting points in your design layout
  • Avoid fine details that may not reproduce well at viewing distance

Proofing Options:

  • Order proofs available for design verification before production
  • Proofs include low-resolution artwork preview and order summary
  • Color match proofs available for color-critical applications
  • Production does not begin until proof approval is received

Design Assistance Available: Our professional graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for banner frame printing or create custom designs from your specifications. Contact customer service for design assistance pricing and turnaround information.

For files larger than 60 MB, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for upload instructions to ensure fastest processing of your outdoor banner frame order.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Outdoor Banner Frames with Professional Installation Hardware

Ready to create your professional outdoor banner frame display? Our complete banner frame systems include everything needed for immediate deployment: durable aluminum hardware, weather-resistant bungee attachments, ground stakes, carrying case, and your custom-printed 33" x 94" vinyl banners.

What's Included in Your Banner Frame Kit:

  • Complete aluminum frame hardware with tool-free assembly
  • One or two full-color custom printed 33" x 94" vinyl banners
  • Weather-resistant bungee cord attachment system
  • Ground stakes for secure outdoor installation
  • Durable nylon carrying case for transport and storage
  • Setup instructions for quick assembly

Why Choose Our Banner Frame System:

  • Professional-grade aluminum construction built for commercial use
  • Weather-resistant materials suitable for extended outdoor exposure
  • Lightweight portable design for easy transport and setup
  • Custom full-color printing on durable 13 oz outdoor vinyl
  • Complete hardware package - nothing else needed for installation

Choose from our template designs, upload your own artwork, or work with our professional design team to create the perfect outdoor banner frame display for your business, event, or organization. Fast production times and reliable shipping ensure your banner frame system arrives when you need it.

Getting Started is Easy:

  1. Select your frame configuration (single or double banner)
  2. Choose your artwork option (template, upload, or custom design)
  3. Select production timeframe and shipping method
  4. Complete your order and receive your professional banner frame system

Questions about outdoor banner frame systems, artwork requirements, or installation? Our customer service team is ready to help at (320) 391-5300 or through our online support system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Outdoor Banner Frames

What comes included with the outdoor banner frame system?
Each complete system includes aluminum frame hardware, weather-resistant bungee cords, ground stakes, carrying case, and one or two custom-printed 33" x 94" vinyl banners. Everything needed for immediate outdoor installation is included.

How quickly can banner frames be set up?
The aluminum frame uses a tool-free snap-together design that typically assembles in under 10 minutes. The lightweight construction allows single-person setup while maintaining professional stability.

What weather conditions can banner frames withstand?
Our banner frames are designed for outdoor use with aluminum construction and weather-resistant components. The bungee attachment system allows natural banner movement in wind while the ground stakes provide secure installation.

Can I order replacement banners for existing frames?
Yes, replacement banners are available separately. We can also provide frame hardware only or complete systems depending on your requirements.

What file formats work best for banner frame artwork?
Vector EPS files with outlined fonts provide the best quality. We also accept high-resolution PDF, TIFF, and JPG files. Minimum 300 DPI resolution is recommended for optimal print quality.

Are custom sizes available for banner frames?
Standard systems include 33" x 94" banners. For custom sizing requirements, please contact customer service to discuss available options and pricing.

How should banner frames be stored when not in use?
The included nylon carrying case protects frame components during transport and storage. Store in a dry location to maximize hardware longevity.

Can banner frames be used on concrete or asphalt surfaces?
While ground stakes work best on grass or dirt, weighted base options are available for hard surface installations. Contact customer service for concrete installation solutions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
